Visit Pear Tree

Schedule a tour.

Tours every Thursday. Our admin team will reach out within 2 business days to confirm a time.

What to expect

  • ✦A walkthrough of our classrooms and outdoor spaces
  • ✦Time with our founder or admissions team
  • ✦An honest conversation about financial aid

Prefer to call?

(510) 817-4690 admin@peartreecs.com

Thank you! Your tour request was sent.

Our admin team will reach out within 2 business days to confirm a time. If you don't hear from us, please email admin@peartreecs.com or call (510) 817-4690.

Pear Tree Community School

A social justice Montessori school in Oakland serving preschool through 5th grade. No family will be turned away.

Campuses

8100 Winthrope St (Preschool)

6925 Chabot Rd (Elementary)
